# BAB FastAPI Security & Reliability Audit

## Critical Findings Summary
Identified 11 major vulnerability categories across core, infrastructure, and services:
- Secret/Credential Handling: 5 issues
- Unsafe Logging: 2 issues  
- Error Mapping: 2 issues
- External Calls: 3 issues
- Scheduler Risks: 4 issues
- Data Loss: 2 issues
- Concurrency/Thread Safety: 6 issues
- Timeout/Retry: 3 issues
- Transaction Consistency: 4 issues
- Race Conditions: 4 issues
- Firebase Admin Misuse: 3 issues

Total: 39 distinct vulnerabilities identified
